arts.ttl: Inter captain Lautaro could make surprise comeback against Barcelona in Champions League
arts.sum: Inter Milan captain Lautaro Martínez is hoping to emulate strike partner Marcus Thuram ahead of their team’s Champions League semifinal against Barcelona on Tuesday. The 27-year-old has scored 21 goals and added six assists for Inter across all competitions this campaign.

arts.ttl: Champions League semifinals: Inter and Barcelona evenly poised, PSG holds a narrow lead over Arsenal
arts.sum: Scoring three away goals should make Inter Milan feel confident heading into the return leg of its Champions League semifinal against Barcelona on Tuesday. Inter was 2-0 up after 21 minutes in the first leg, before 17-year-old Spain star Lamine Yamal scored a stunning goal and Barcelona fought back to draw 3-3 at home in a pulsating contest packed with spectacular goals.

arts.ttl: Barcelona hit with major injury blow for Inter clash but Robert Lewandowski cleared to play
arts.sum: Barcelona will have Robert Lewandowski as part of their attempt to reach the Champions League final against Inter in the semi-final second leg. The score is locked at 3-3 from the first leg at Montjuic, but the Blaugrana were left disappointed they could not take an advantage to Milan. arts.ttl: Inter Milan offer fresh Lautaro Martinez injury update ahead of Barcelona battle
arts.sum: Inter Milan have offered an injury update on star striker Lautaro Martinez ahead of their UEFA Champions League showdown with Barcelona. Hansi Flick’s side head to the San Siro for their semi final second leg on May 6 on the back of a thrilling 3-3 first leg clash.
